summary: Tested all 6 bug fixes for Hispaloshop. All bugs verified as FIXED. Backend tests pass (5/5). Frontend verification via Playwright confirms all fixes working.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1 (P0) VERIFIED: LANGUAGE_NAMES dict added to ai_chat.py lines 27-32. POST /api/chat/message returns 200 (not 500)
Bug Fix 2 (P1) VERIFIED: BottomNavBar.js line 199 - Profile URL changed from getDashboardUrl() to /user/{user.user_id}. Confirmed via Playwright: href='/user/user_test123'
Bug Fix 3 (P1) VERIFIED: ProducerPayments.js line 11 - useTranslation import added, line 146 - const { t } = useTranslation(). Page renders correctly at /producer/payments with title 'Ganancias'
Bug Fix 4 (P2) VERIFIED: CreateRecipePage.js IngredientRow lines 16-35 - Responsive layout with space-y-2 for 2-row mobile layout. Screenshots confirm quantity/unit on separate row

Bug Fix 5 (P2) VERIFIED: BottomNavBar.js lines 173-187 - handlePostButton() calls galleryRef.current?.click() instead of opening panel. Hidden input at line 278 with data-testid='gallery-file-input'. Panel opens only after file selected
Bug Fix 6 (P1) VERIFIED: SellerAIAssistant.js lines 106-109 - User messages have 'bg-stone-900 text-white' styling. Screenshot confirms white text on dark background
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes from iteration 103 verified working. LANGUAGE_NAMES dict in ai_chat.py enables multi-language AI chat. Profile nav now links to public profile /user/{user_id}. ProducerPayments uses useTranslation hook. IngredientRow has 2-row mobile layout. + button triggers file input directly. SellerAIAssistant has white text on dark bg for user messages.

features_verified.Bug_Fix_1_AI_Chat_LANGUAGE_NAMES: PASS - POST /api/chat/message returns 200 with AI response
features_verified.Bug_Fix_2_Profile_Button_Navigation: PASS - Profile link href='/user/user_test123' instead of /dashboard/profile
features_verified.Bug_Fix_3_Producer_Payments_useTranslati: PASS - Page renders at /producer/payments with 'Ganancias' title, no crash
features_verified.Bug_Fix_4_Create_Recipe_Mobile_Layout: PASS - IngredientRow shows 2 rows on mobile (375px): name+actions, quantity+unit
features_verified.Bug_Fix_5_Mobile_Post_Gallery_Flow: PASS - + button triggers hidden file input, panel opens only after file selected
features_verified.Bug_Fix_6_Sales_AI_White_Text: PASS - User messages have bg-stone-900 text-white styling
